_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 2 tumor suppressor protein is expressed in oligodendrocytes and regulates cell proliferation and process formation.

_contextSnippet: A typical curve of cultured oligodendrocytes in XCELLigence...was composed of an initial sharp increase in impedance (cell index), probably representing sedimentation and adhesion of cells (within 4–6 hours)
resourceName: XCELLigence Real Time Cell Analysis System
details: Successfully measured impedance changes over 100 hours, detecting initial cell adhesion phase (4-6 hours), cell rounding (8-10 hours), and continuous proliferation phase (50-60 hours)
